name: Modern Plant Based Foods Inc.
summary: Modern Plant Based Foods Inc. engages in developing and selling plant-based meat alternatives made from plants. The company's product lineup includes the modern burgers, modern crabcakes, modern meatballs, modern crumbles, and sauces. It offers its products through various retail locations in the British Columbia Lower Mainland, as well as on e-commerce platforms. The company was formerly known as Modern Meat Inc. Modern Plant Based Foods Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
